name: Blight Breath
description:
Activate 1 (manipulate)

This foul-smelling bottle contains compressed, noxious fumes. After you inhale the odious gases of the blight breath, you gain resistance 10 to poison for as long as you hold your breath. You can exhale the blight breath as a single action. The resulting spray of noxious fumes deals |options:area-damage] damage to each creature in a , with a save
